changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_infos WHERE identity_card = 'USER001'

changeSet.comment: Create user_info record for sample USER account
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_infos ( create_date, create_by, is_delete, is_active, first_name, last_name, identity_card, phone_number ) VALUES ( CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, FALSE, TRUE, 'Sample', 'User', 'USER001', '0111111111' );

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'user@minhpt.com'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users ( create_date, create_by, is_delete, is_active, email, password, user_info_id ) VALUES ( CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, FALSE, TRUE, 'user@minhpt.com', '$2y$10$TMEsHS131suka5VJFPKLKe8nOoiC79cxnDxk1QYvXDkdJbd6Qmdhy', (SELECT id FROM user_infos WHERE identity_card = 'USER001' LIMIT 1) );

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roles WHERE user_role = 'USER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'user@minhpt.com'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users_roles ur INNER JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.email = 'user@minhpt.com' AND r.user_role = 'USER'

changeSet.comment: Assign USER role to sample user account
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u CROSS JOIN roles r WHERE u.email = 'user@minhpt.com' AND r.user_role = 'USER' LIMIT 1;

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_infos WHERE identity_card = 'PM001'

changeSet.comment: Create user_info record for sample PROJECT_MANAGER account
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_infos ( create_date, create_by, is_delete, is_active, first_name, last_name, identity_card, phone_number ) VALUES ( CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, FALSE, TRUE, 'Project', 'Manager', 'PM001', '0222222222' );

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'pm@minhpt.com'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users ( create_date, create_by, is_delete, is_active, email, password, user_info_id ) VALUES ( CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, FALSE, TRUE, 'pm@minhpt.com', '$2y$10$YqD5fTFBqMaT5W23B1HP4uTbkIXUJ4nTS6s5rd/T/o0fNcsoaJVpy', (SELECT id FROM user_infos WHERE identity_card = 'PM001' LIMIT 1) );

changeSet.author: system

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roles WHERE user_role = 'PROJECT_MANAGER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = 'pm@minhpt.com'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users_roles ur INNER JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.email = 'pm@minhpt.com' AND r.user_role = 'PROJECT_MANAGER'

changeSet.comment: Assign PROJECT_MANAGER role to sample pm account
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO users_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u CROSS JOIN roles r WHERE u.email = 'pm@minhpt.com' AND r.user_role = 'PROJECT_MANAGER' LIMIT 1;
